title: Renzo's Custom Blocks
description: this mod is adding custom blocks and some items to build with
body:
Renzo's Custom Blocks you just want more building blocks right? well, then download this mod! A mod that is adding a lot of blocks into the game. These blocks are building blocks everyone needs like vertical stairs and slabs and more colored blocks(SOON).
Before you download read this: ## there are no crafting recipe's yet so the mod isn't working in survival(planned for next update). **THE MOD IS IN BETA YET AND THERE IS NOT MUCH CONTENT IN THE MOD!**
### what blocks are added? currently only colored versions of the stone bricks.
next update have more concrete stuff like stairs and slabs.
You need to download this mod for the upcoming mod MeepDungeons! You can follow progress in our discord server!
